name: Shallot Puree - Great Chefs
recipeIngredient: 3 each Shallot, bulbs, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the shallots with 1/2 cup of olive oil.
2. Drizzle a little clear olive oil over the top of the puree.
3. Refrigerate overnight or for up to a week if desired.
4. Store this puree in the refrigerator for up to three weeks without significant loss of flavor.
